prompts.prompt: Write: "One strategy that helps me focus is ___"
prompts.guidance: Think about activities or techniques that help you concentrate better.

prompts.prompt: Write: "When I lose focus, I can ___"
prompts.guidance: Reflect on what you do to regain your concentration.

prompts.prompt: Write: "A quiet place helps me focus because ___"
prompts.guidance: Think about why a peaceful environment is important for concentration.

prompts.prompt: Write: "One distraction I avoid while studying is ___"
prompts.guidance: Consider what things take away your attention when you need to focus.
Reflect on practices that help you maintain better concentration.
